about:
Here is the data you requested. Remember: unlike other apps, Telegram never uses your private data to target ads. Telegram only keeps the information it needs to function as a secure and feature-rich cloud service.

Check out Settings > Privacy & Security on Telegram's mobile apps for the relevant settings.

text: I can help you create and manage Telegram bots. If you're new to the Bot API, please

.

You can control me by sending these commands:
- can your bot be added to groups?
- get a list of your web apps
- get a list of your games

text_entities.text: I can help you create and manage Telegram bots. If you're new to the Bot API, please

.

You can control me by sending these commands:
- can your bot be added to groups?
- get a list of your web apps
- get a list of your games

messages.text: Alright, a new bot. How are we going to call it? Please choose a name for your bot.

text_entities.text: Alright, a new bot. How are we going to call it? Please choose a name for your bot.

messages.text: Good. Now let's choose a username for your bot. It must end in `bot`. Like this, for example: TetrisBot or tetris_bot.

text_entities.text: Good. Now let's choose a username for your bot. It must end in `bot`. Like this, for example: TetrisBot or tetris_bot.

text: Done! Congratulations on your new bot. You will find it at
. You can now add a description, about section and profile picture for your bot, see

for a list of commands. By the way, when you've finished creating your cool bot, ping our Bot Support if you want a better username for it. Just make sure the bot is fully operational before you do this.

Use this token to access the HTTP API:

, it can be used by anyone to control your bot.

For a description of the Bot API, see this page:
